message:
fix: rename plugin commands to avoid built-in conflicts; bump default Opus to 4.7 (#1678)

* chore: bump all packages to v3.6.11 — published to npm

SmartRetrieval integration + 4 bug fixes (#1604, #1605, #1606, #1616).

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

* fix: rename plugin commands to avoid built-in conflicts; bump default Opus model

- Rename 9 plugin commands/skills whose bare names collided with built-in
  Claude Code slash commands and skills (/doctor, /loop, /schedule, /browser,
  /status, /cost, /memory, /docs, /sparc) to ruflo-* prefixed names
- Update ruflo init to default to claude-opus-4-7 (was 4.6) in
  settings.json modelPreferences and statusline display
- Update statusline pkgVersion fallback 3.5 -> 3.6 to match published version
- Add plugin showcase GIF above Quick Start in README

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

---------

Co-authored-by: Reuven <cohen@ruv-mac-mini.local>

files.patch:
@@ -34,6 +34,8 @@ User --> Ruflo (CLI/MCP) --> Router --> Swarm --> Agents --> Memory --> LLM Prov
 
 ---
 
+![Ruflo Plugins](./ruflo-plugins.gif)
+
 ## Quick Start
 
 ### Claude Code Plugin (Recommended)

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 ---
-name: browser
+name: ruflo-browser
 description: Browser session management -- list active sessions, take screenshots, close sessions
 ---

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 ---
-name: status
+name: ruflo-status
 description: Show Ruflo system health, MCP server status, and active agents
 ---
 $ARGUMENTS

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 ---
-name: doctor
+name: ruflo-doctor
 description: Run health checks on the Ruflo installation and fix common issues
 argument-hint: "[--fix]"
 allowed-tools: Bash(npx *)

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 ---
-name: cost
+name: ruflo-cost
 description: Cost tracking operations — generate reports, view breakdowns, set budgets, and get optimization recommendations
 ---

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 ---
-name: docs
+name: ruflo-docs
 description: Generate or update documentation for a file, module, or the entire project
 ---
 $ARGUMENTS

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 ---
-name: loop
-description: Start a /loop worker for periodic Ruflo task execution
+name: ruflo-loop
+description: Start a Ruflo background worker (audit, optimize, testgaps, etc.) on a recurring schedule
 ---
 $ARGUMENTS
 Start a cache-aware /loop worker. Parse the worker name from $ARGUMENTS.

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 ---
-name: schedule
+name: ruflo-schedule
 description: Schedule persistent workers via CronCreate
 ---
 $ARGUMENTS

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 ---
-name: memory
+name: ruflo-memory
 description: SOTA memory CRUD — store, search (hybrid/graph-rag/dense), retrieve, list, consolidate
 ---
 $ARGUMENTS

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 ---
-name: sparc
+name: ruflo-sparc
 description: SPARC methodology commands — initialize, track, advance, and report on Specification-Pseudocode-Architecture-Refinement-Completion workflows
 ---
 $ARGUMENTS
